rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Educ. Code §26.0062, which governs school district disclosure of instructional plans and course syllabi. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Each school district shall adopt a policy to make available on the district's Internet website at the beginning of each semester an instructional plan or course syllabus for each class offered in the district for that semester.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns instructional plan disclosure, not property tax exemptions.
